commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7b78621f353fbbf0c6432d250f0a474a3fa1c438)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a Slack outbound adapter assertion that fails threaded payload sends unless the send result has a matching `threadTs`, plus regression tests for missing, mismatched, and matching thread results.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +83. Total +107 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect at source level: current main and `v2026.6.10` show `sendMessageSlack` may synthesize returned `threadTs` from `opts.threadTs`, so a missing Slack confirmation can pass the new guard. The broader linked Slack origin-tuple issue still lacks a reduced live reproduction in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR still has a sender-contract defect and lacks contributor-supplied real Slack proof, which automation cannot supply.

target.title: fix(slack): fail unconfirmed threaded deliveries
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Slack-originated long-running or delegated workflows could be marked successful even when the final threaded Slack send did not confirm the originating thread timestamp. That made answer generation look successful while the response might not have landed in the requested thread.

## Why This Change Was Made

The Slack outbound adapter now fails closed after each threaded send unless `sendMessageSlack` returns a matching `threadTs`. Regression coverage exercises confirmed delivery, missing thread evidence, and mismatched thread timestamps so the contract stays explicit.

## User Impact

Slack users get a delivery error instead of a false success when a threaded response cannot be confirmed in the requested thread. Normal threaded deliveries still pass when Slack returns the expected `threadTs`.

## Evidence

- `pnpm test:extension slack -- extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts` - 1 file, 7 tests passed.
- `node node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.ts extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts` - 0 warnings, 0 errors.
- `git diff --check` - passed.
- Secret scan over `git diff origin/main...HEAD` - clean.

Fixes #96692.
target.author: lin-hongkuan
